name: Cape Coral Rectangular Aluminum and Faux Wood Dining Table: Modern Outdoor Furniture - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Your outdoor dinner parties just got even more exciting with a dining table made for your summer activities. Create a stunning centerpiece for your outdoor dining set with a simple addition of our reliable table that emphasizes a charismatic modern appeal. Its delightful faux wood slat top enhances its minimalistic modern design of this piece while providing incredible stability. With an aluminum frame, this piece won’t just blend with your existing decor but will bring out the best of your interior space.

MODERN DESIGN: With clean, precise lines, our dining table is the ideal modern accessory for your outdoor space. Finished with sleek faux wood slats and smooth aluminum frames, this table not only offers a chic, minimalistic look but also provides incredible structure.

ALUMINUM FRAME: This table is built with aluminum, creating a lightweight and stable frame. This material is rust-resistant which will further extend the life of your product.

FAUX WOOD: This wood alternative is a blend of plastics and wood that is not only eco-friendly but is also low-maintenance. Our tabletop uses this material to give the appearance of a beautiful wood look without the high upkeep.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This dining table is 70.25” W x 35.50” D x 30.25” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this table. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
